examples: Moesha had reached the age of puberty.
Most traditional societies have transition rites at puberty.
Menstruation (a period) is a major stage of puberty in girls; it's one of the many physical signs that a girl is turning into a woman.
Psychosis usually develops after puberty, but there are plenty of cases of childhood psychosis.
Some life transitions, such as entering puberty, trigger hormonal changes that may alter the stress response.
